name: tocodex-signing-relay
description: Zero-dependency relay that speaks ToCodex's dynamic HMAC-SHA256 request signing scheme (reverse-engineered from the ToCodex VSCode extension).

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check lib/sign.js && node --check lib/headers.js && node --check lib/http-client.js && node --check lib/normalize.js && node --check lib/sse.js && node --check lib/util.js && node --check lib/openai-schema.js && node --check lib/anthropic.js && node --check lib/responses.js
scripts.test: for f in test/*.test.js; do node "$f" || exit 1; done
